item.title: Nail the Top Section! 📋 • Craft a compelling summary with key skills. • Use: “I achieved X% by Y in Z months.” • Highlight relevant experience in bullet points. • Tailor it to the job description for impact. • Ensure contact info is easy to find. 📞 Is your resume's top section grabbing attention in 7 seconds? #resume #jobsearch #ScalePilot #SocialPilot #AIAutomations
item.description: Nail the Top Section! 📋 • Craft a compelling summary with key skills. • Use: “I achieved X% by Y in Z months.” • Highlight relevant experience in bullet points. • Tailor it to the job description for impact. • Ensure contact info is easy to find. 📞 Is your resume's top section grabbing attention in 7 seconds? #resume #jobsearch #ScalePilot #SocialPilot #AIAutomations
